---
title: "Report new source of information"
format: html
---

## via GitHub issues

Now you can report a new dataset is available for incorporation to AFLIBER through this form.
This will redirect you to your GitHub account, and a new issue will be created. If you do not own a GitHub account, consider reporting via the [collaboration form](mailform.html).


Please include the doi of the paper in the **title** box if possible, and a complete reference in the **description**. Please consider specifying a data repository (e.g. Dryad, Zenodo) where data are available if possible.



<form action="https://github.com/iramosgutierrez/AFLIBER_update/issues/new" method="get">

  <label for="title"><strong>New source of data (DOI/ref)</strong></label><br>
  <input type="text" id="title" name="title" style="width: 400px;"><br><br>

  <label for="body"><strong>Reference</strong></label><br>
  <textarea id="body" name="body" rows="6" cols="60"></textarea><br><br>

  
  <!-- Optional preset label -->
  <input type="hidden" name="labels" value="new_data">

  <button type="submit">Submit Issue</button>

</form>
